bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.acrobatics.to: Acrobatics — balance, tumbling, staying on your feet. Dexterity-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.sleight_of_ha: Sleight of Hand — pickpocketing, planting items, fine motor tasks. Dexterity-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.stealth.toolt: Stealth — moving silently and hiding from enemies. Dexterity-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.arcana.toolti: Arcana — knowledge of spells, magic items, and planes. Intelligence-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.history.toolt: History — knowledge of past events, legends, and lore. Intelligence-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.investigation: Investigation — searching for clues and deducing information. Intelligence-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.nature.toolti: Nature — knowledge of terrain, plants, animals, and weather. Intelligence-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.religion.tool: Religion — knowledge of deities, rites, and holy symbols. Intelligence-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.animal_handli: Animal Handling — calming and controlling animals. Wisdom-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.insight.toolt: Insight — reading people's intentions and detecting lies. Wisdom-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.medicine.tool: Medicine — stabilizing the dying and diagnosing illness. Wisdom-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.perception.to: Perception — noticing things in your environment. Wisdom-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.survival.tool: Survival — tracking, foraging, and navigating the wilderness. Wisdom-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.deception.too: Deception — lying convincingly and misleading others. Charisma-based.
Intimidation — influencing others through threats and fear. Charisma-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.performance.t: Performance — entertaining through music, dance, or acting. Charisma-based.
bbf.skill.boundbyfate-core.persuasion.to: Persuasion — influencing others through tact and good will. Charisma-based.
